description:
Download videos from YouTube

There are so many interesting things to be found on YouTube, but you can't download the videos or save them as audio files by default. That's why we developed YouTube Video Downloader. This app will help you to accomplish video downloads quickly and without hangups. With our program you can simply download the whole playlist or YouTube channel at once and watch it whenever and wherever you want.
- added support for kick.com - VOD, clips and channel videos
- added support for Spotify artist pages
- lots of improvements for YouTube
- fixed YouTube Music playlists and album links parsing
- fixed YouTube Music search
- fixed YouTube chapters language to match app language
- fixed download from VK (user and group page links)
- fixed download from SoundCloud
- fixed download from Tubi
- fixed download from Deezer (removed tracks)
- improved download from Audiomack
- fixed several crashes on app exit and during parsing
- fixed loss of download history when app hangs
- minor improvements for stability
